metadata.title: Sanga Local Government
metadata.description: Official website of Sanga Local Government Area, Kaduna State, Nigeria.

slides.title: Sanga – Heritage and Agriculture
slides.subtitle: Sanga Local Government Area is known for its rich cultural heritage and fertile agricultural land in southern Kaduna.

slides.title: Sanga – Communities Supporting Development
slides.subtitle: Farmers and traders across Sanga contribute to food production and economic activity in Kaduna State.

paragraphs: Sanga Local Government Area is located in the southern region of Kaduna State, Nigeria. The administrative headquarters is Gwantu town.
The LGA is home to several indigenous ethnic groups including Numana, Ninzam, Mada, as well as Hausa and Fulani communities.
Agriculture is the main economic activity, with crops such as maize, millet, sorghum, and groundnuts cultivated across rural communities.

chairman.name: Executive Chairman, Sanga Local Government
messageParagraphs: Welcome to the official website of Sanga Local Government Area. Our administration is committed to strengthening agriculture, improving infrastructure, and delivering quality public services to our communities.
Sanga is blessed with fertile land and hardworking farmers who contribute significantly to Kaduna State’s agricultural production.
Through transparent governance and collaboration with community leaders, we aim to achieve sustainable development for all residents.

cards.title: Maize Farming
cards.subtitle: Staple Crop
cards.description: Maize is widely cultivated across Sanga communities and serves as a staple food crop.

cards.title: Millet & Sorghum
cards.subtitle: Grain Production
cards.description: Millet and sorghum are important grains grown by farmers throughout the LGA.

cards.title: Livestock Rearing
cards.subtitle: Animal Husbandry
cards.description: Livestock such as cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry are raised across rural communities within Sanga.

news.subtitle: Stay informed about development projects, community programs, and government initiatives in Sanga.

footer.headquarters: Headquarters: Local Government Secretariat, Gwantu, Kaduna State, Nigeria.

hero.title: About Sanga
hero.subtitle: Discover the culture, geography, and economy of Sanga Local Government Area.

location: Neighboring LGAs: Jema'a, Kauru, and Kaura.
demographics: Major Ethnic Groups: Numana, Ninzam, Mada, Hausa, Fulani.
Languages Spoken: Local indigenous languages, Hausa, and English.
economy: Main Economic Activities: Farming, livestock rearing, and rural trading.
Climate: Tropical savannah climate suitable for agriculture.

geographyEconomy.title: Geography & Economy
geographyEconomy.location: Sanga lies within the southern Kaduna region and is characterized by fertile farmland and rural communities.
geographyEconomy.climate: The area experiences a rainy season between May and October and a dry season from November to April.
mainActivities: Crop Farming: Maize, millet, sorghum, and groundnuts.
Livestock Rearing: Cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry.
Local Markets: Agricultural trading across rural communities.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Reach out to Sanga Local Government for inquiries and information.
